seoTitle: Oxley Park vs Oxley Vale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Oxley Park and Oxley Vale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Oxley Park vs Oxley Vale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Oxley Park and Oxley Vale.
heading: Oxley Park vs Oxley Vale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Oxley Park, New South Wales and Oxley Vale, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Oxley Park has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Oxley Vale (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Oxley Park or Oxley Vale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Oxley Park has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Oxley Vale scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Oxley Park scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Oxley Vale scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Oxley Park or Oxley Vale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Oxley Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
